name: Jagankumar E
title: Technical Architect, eGov Foundation
tagline: Technical Architect and Full-Stack Engineer passionate about designing scalable, configurable systems for digital governance.
bio: I'm a Technical Architect at eGov Foundation, working on DIGIT — a platform for urban governance used across 450+ urban local bodies in India, and CARE — an open-source health management information system deployed in multiple states.

My recent work includes the HCM Console for health campaign management in African field operations, DIGIT Workbench for centralized configuration management using JSON Schema, and MUKTA (Digit Works) — an employment scheme delivery platform for urban workers in Odisha.

I also contribute to healthcare interoperability projects including CARE's radiology/DICOM stack, pharmacy integrations (eAushadhi, DVDMS), and maintain CI/CD infrastructure with multi-architecture Docker builds and k3s deployments.
